note: RESOLVED 2026-06-10: Ollama Cloud is SUBSCRIPTION-priced (Free / Pro $20mo / Max $100mo with usage multipliers), NOT per-token — ollama.com/cloud explicitly: 'Ollama doesn't cap you at a set number of tokens', no per-Mtoken price sheet exists. Marginal per-run cost is ~$0 within plan limits; the constrained resource is USAGE VOLUME, so the harness's tokens-per-success ranking is the correct economics, not a fallback. inputPerMTokUSD/outputPerMTokUSD stay null for subscription models BY DESIGN; only fill them for true pay-per-token providers. Claude models run on the Claude Code subscription (benchmarks only) and also stay null.
